sizing_rule.note: Position size determined by current optimal f$ (in dollars) calculated from Equation 2.11 using historical trade results. Daily dollar gains/losses (D$) computed from close-to-close price changes multiplied by dollars per point. Use equalized historical data when materially different from raw data.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by the current optimal f in dollars (f$), calculated from historical trade data using the previous day's close price and daily dollar gains/losses (D$).
